items.title: EU to Say Airlines Can Use US Jet Fuel Amid Hormuz Block
items.desc: The European Union is set to confirm that the continent’s airlines can burn a type of jet fuel that’s far more commonly consumed in the US, helping them to cope with the oil-market chaos wrought by the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
